scripts.setup: bun install && bun run setup:frontend && bun run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: python3 -m venv backend/.venv && backend/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && backend/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "bun run dev:frontend" "bun run dev:backend"
